sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95158" key="skorpiano/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκορπ-ιᾱνός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n95158.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">born under</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to Scorpio</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἱ ς</foreign>. Antioch.Astr.in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.112</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ς. κλίμα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Harp.</author> </bibl> </cit> Astr.ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1389.tlg001:8(3).138" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(3).138</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
